routing_failures.intent: Create a cluster.lok8s.yaml for kind Lo on domain obs.lok8s.dev that bootstraps cilium and the tempo addon.
Author a cluster.lok8s.yaml for a kind Lo cluster ml on domain ml.lok8s.dev with an OIDC issuer https://auth.example.com and clientID lok8s.
Create a cluster.lok8s.yaml for kind Lo on domain rfl.lok8s.dev that bootstraps cilium and reflector.
Author a kind Lo cluster.lok8s.yaml on domain ns.lok8s.dev with spec.cluster.namespace set to platform and cilium bootstrapped.
Write a kind Lo cluster.lok8s.yaml on domain wk.lok8s.dev with 1 control plane and 2 workers.
My cluster won't bootstrap, help me figure out what's wrong.
I'm getting ImagePullBackOff on my pods.
